eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Ellis, TX; at 08:00 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 08:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Midlothian Police Department Office of Emergency Management TEST. Emergency alert system test as part of the Texas statewide alerting drill occurring between 10:00 AM and 12:30 PM today. You may receive this alert on your mobile phone during the exercise. No emergency is occurring. No action needed. This test helps ensure emergency alerts work properly during real emergencies.
